data.title: BlackRock: 'Reasonable Range' Of Bitcoin Allocation In Multi-Asset Portfolios Is Between 1-2% (UPDATED)

data.title: Swiss Contract Service Provider Lonza Exits Capsules Business To Focus On Drug Development
data.description: Lonza unveils its "One Lonza" strategy, highlighting a new structure to streamline operations, strengthen CDMO leadership, and project 20% CER sales growth in 2025.

data.title: 9 Consumer Discretionary Stocks With Whale Alerts In Today's Session
How Bitcoin ETFs Are Changing The Way Institutions Manage Risk According To Experts
data.description: Experts discuss Bitcoin ETFs, risk management, and market liquidity at Benzinga's Future of Digital Assets conference. ETFs simplify institutional access and offer advanced tools for risk mitigation. They could lead to greater adoption and convergence of traditional and digital markets in the future.
